# Vendored upstream source

`chatgpt-on-wechat-1.7.3/` is an unmodified source snapshot exported from:

- Repository: <https://github.com/zhayujie/chatgpt-on-wechat>
- Release tag: `1.7.3`
- Commit: `22d67b3a596f8c96cc2f8b2e5ed58a47c8bb53bb`
- License: MIT; the upstream `LICENSE` file is retained in the snapshot.

Xiaoyou keeps this snapshot in-repository so its base application can be
rebuilt without pulling `zhayujie/chatgpt-on-wechat:1.7.3`.  Framework changes
belong in the root `patches/` directory; do not edit the snapshot silently.
